package.name: cartesian_control_manager
package.description: Robot-agnostic orchestrator for FZI's Cartesian controllers. Spawns cartesian_force_controller / cartesian_motion_controller / cartesian_compliance_controller (all inactive) into the live controller_manager, relays a gravity-compensated wrench onto each controller's RELIABLE input, publishes a target_wrench heartbeat, exposes engage/disengage Trigger services that atomically swap the robot's JointTrajectoryController with the selected FZI controller, and runs a safety supervisor that auto-disengages on stale topics or excessive force/torque. All robot-specific knobs (joint names, frame names, JTC controller name, topic names, FZI YAML location) are parameters, so the same manager runs on any robot whose URDF is reachable to the FZI plugins. The Cartesian hot path itself is the C++ plugin from a fork of https://github.com/fzi-forschungszentrum-informatik/cartesian_controllers. The system runs without any dashboard; cartesian_controller_dashboard is a separate, optional package.
